# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      },
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID"
      }
    },
    "appServicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the primary application service principal"
      }
    },
    "backendServicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the backend service principal"
      }
    },
    "cicdServicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the CI/CD pipeline service principal"
      }
    },
    "adminGroupObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the admin Azure AD group for vault management"
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable soft delete for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90,
      "minValue": 7,
      "maxValue": 90,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Soft delete retention period in days"
      }
    },
    "enablePurgeProtection": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable purge protection to prevent permanent deletion during retention period"
      }
    },
    "allowedSubnetResourceIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of subnet resource IDs allowed to access the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "allowedIpAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges for Key Vault access"
      }
    },
    "logAnalyticsWorkspaceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Resource ID of Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic logging"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "virtualNetworkRules": {
      "copy": [
        {
          "name": "rules",
          "count": "[length(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds'))]",
          "input": {
            "id": "[parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')[copyIndex('rules')]]",
            "ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint": false
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "ipRules": {
      "copy": [
        {
          "name": "rules",
          "count": "[length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses'))]",
          "input": {
            "value": "[parameters('allowedIpAddresses')[copyIndex('rules')]]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "hasNetworkRestrictions": "[or(greater(length(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')), 0), greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0))]",
    "networkDefaultAction": "[if(variables('hasNetworkRestrictions'), 'Deny', 'Deny')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enablePurgeProtection": "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "[variables('networkDefaultAction')]",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "virtualNetworkRules": "[variables('virtualNetworkRules').rules]",
          "ipRules": "[variables('ipRules').rules]"
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('adminGroupObjectId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "set",
                "delete",
                "recover",
                "backup",
                "restore"
              ],
              "keys": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "create",
                "delete",
                "recover",
                "backup",
                "restore"
              ],
              "certificates": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "create",
                "delete",
                "recover",
                "backup",
                "restore"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('appServicePrincipalObjectId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ],
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('backendServicePrincipalObjectId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ],
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('cicdServicePrincipalObjectId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "set"
              ],
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "tags": {
        "environment": "development",
        "managedBy": "arm-template",
        "securityReview": "required-before-production"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[not(empty(parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceId')))]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '-diagnostics')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "workspaceId": "[parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceId')]",
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "AuditEvent",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          },
          {
            "category": "AzurePolicyEvaluationDetails",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ],
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "AllMetrics",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    }
  }
}
